summary: All three P0 bugs verified as FIXED. Dashboard QuotesTab shows Q-2026-032 with line items and totals. Client Portal displays quotes correctly with Accept/Decline buttons. Stripe proxy generates payment sessions successfully. Quote acceptance flow working - clicking Accept creates income record and generates Stripe checkout URL.

bug_fix_1_dashboard_quotes_tab.details: Logged in, navigated to dashboard, clicked lead card in Kanban board, opened LeadDetailModal, clicked Quotes tab. Quote Q-2026-032 displayed with ₦5,000,000.00 total, Created Mar 8 2026, Valid until Apr 7 2026, Viewed badge, Copy Link button

bug_fix_2_client_portal_quotes.details: Portal page /portal/gbi5z98i5sgz5txo6stgtb shows Quote #Q-2026-032 with Pending Review badge, line item 'Art Exhibition coverage', Qty 1, Rate ₦5,000,000.00, Amount ₦5,000,000.00, Subtotal, Total, Terms & Conditions, Valid until date, Accept Quote and Decline buttons

bug_fix_3_stripe_proxy_payment.details: Stripe proxy at localhost:8002 running. Health check returns {status: ok}. Payment session creation via POST /create-session returns valid Stripe checkout URL

quote_acceptance_flow.details: Clicked Accept Quote button on portal. Quote status changed to ACCEPTED. Backend created income record (cmmiixr1m0001nstkj2ph7dgg). Stripe checkout URL generated: https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_a10np1o3... Notification email sent.

backend_api_leads_quotes.details: GET /api/leads/cmmie12k1000ua2vcnr0e3djz/quotes returns 1 quote with correct details

backend_api_portal.details: GET /api/portal/gbi5z98i5sgz5txo6stgtb returns portal data with quotes array containing quote Q-2026-032

context_for_next_testing_agent: All three P0 bugs have been verified as fixed: (1) Dashboard QuotesTab displays quote Q-2026-032 correctly in LeadDetailModal, (2) Client Portal shows quotes with Accept/Decline buttons that work, (3) Stripe proxy at localhost:8002 creates payment sessions.
